song.title: 450 Nothing But The Blood
song.author: Robert Lowry
song.presentation: V1 C V2 C V3 C V4 C
song.lyrics:
[V1] 1) What can wash away my sin? Nothing but the blood of Jesus; What can make me whole again? Nothing but the blood of Jesus.
[C] Chorus Oh precious is the flow, That makes me white as snow; No other fount I know, Nothing but the blood of Jesus.
[V2] 2) For my cleansing this I see, Nothing but the blood of Jesus; For my cleansing this my plea, Nothing but the blood of Jesus.
[V3] 3) Nothing can my sin erase- Nothing but the blood of Jesus! Naught of works, ‘tis all of grace- Nothing but the blood of Jesus!
[V4] 4) This is all my hope and peace, Nothing but the blood of Jesus; This is all my righteousness, Nothing but the blood of Jesus.
